scope: Competitive set for AEVUM, a premium concierge whole-body MRI clinic in Johor Bahru by Elitez. AEVUM is targeting Singapore HNW, Indonesian HNW, and KL/JB affluent who want named-radiologist-read whole-body MRI without the hospital queue, package opacity, or 7-figure price tag. Pricing: Core RM1,999 (~S$606) / Comprehensive RM8,699 (~S$2,636) / Legacy Ultimate RM17,499 (~S$5,303) / Legacy Platinum RM24,499 (~S$7,424). Cross-border SG↔JB arbitrage is a structural advantage — RTS Link end-2026, 5-min crossing, S$5–7 fare, 140k pax/day capacity. The set excludes pure cosmetic / wellness retreats with no MRI.
methodology: Public clinic websites + SG/MY medical-tourism aggregators + insurer-bundled wellness data + Reddit/HardwareZone HNW-screening threads + research_report.md (Apr 2026). MYR converted at 3.3 MYR/SGD (Apr 2026 FX). Singapore hospital screening prices are mostly published; private/concierge prices are 'partial' (aggregator-disclosed). JB/MY hospital screening is partially published. AEVUM self-row uses live published RM tier prices.

categories.sg_hospital_premium: Singapore hospital-anchored premium executive screening (Raffles, Mount Elizabeth, NUH, SGH, Thomson)
categories.sg_wholebody_mri: Singapore standalone whole-body MRI / advanced imaging centres (AsiaMedic, Lifescan, Elite Medical, Iconic)
categories.jb_private_hospital: Johor private hospitals offering MRI + executive screening (Mahkota, KPJ Bandar Dato' Onn, Gleneagles JB, Pantai JB)
categories.kl_penang_premium: KL / Penang / Selangor premium hospitals attracting JB-SG cross-border patients (Sunway Medical Velocity, Pantai Penang)
categories.international_dtc_mri: International direct-to-consumer whole-body MRI brands (Prenuvo, Ezra, Neko Health) for category benchmark

competitors.name: Mount Elizabeth Health Screening Centre
competitors.target_market: SG HNW C-suite and family-office principals seeking same-day hospital-anchored executive screening with cardiac, endoscopy, full bloodwork
strengths: Hospital-grade endoscopy + cardiac stress + tumour-marker bloods bundled — AEVUM cannot replicate without a hospital licence
Parkway Pantai SG hospital brand carries serious clinical credibility for HNW
Full follow-up specialist referral pathway under one roof
weaknesses: S$12,388 ceiling — explicit 'too expensive' signal in SG HNW Reddit screening threads
Hospital queue and full-day commitment vs concierge same-room expectation
No FSC-quiet imaging suite — the experience itself is hospital-clinical, not luxury-clinical

competitors.name: Raffles Medical — Platinum Executive Screening
competitors.target_market: SG corporate-account executives 45+ wanting recognised hospital brand with bundled corporate insurance billing
strengths: 40+ year SG hospital brand with deep corporate-account relationships and captive demand
Endoscopy + cardiac + imaging in single half-day package
Insurance pre-authorisation pathway already built
weaknesses: S$11,408 / S$11,530 list price puts it in the executive-only tier
Long results turnaround vs concierge same-day promise
Brochure-ware booking experience, no DTC online flow

competitors.name: AsiaMedic Wellness Assessment Centre
competitors.target_market: SG affluent self-pay patients seeking standalone advanced imaging (whole-body MRI, low-dose CT, cardiac CT) without hospital admission
strengths: Closest direct competitor in SG — standalone advanced imaging at sub-hospital pricing
Established radiologist roster with 25+ year reputation
Single-purpose imaging-led brand resonates with image-first buyers
weaknesses: Pricing not fully published — 'enquire for quote' on flagship MRI packages
Limited follow-up care pathway vs hospital-anchored players
Website still feels brochure-ware vs DTC-modern category

competitors.name: Lifescan Medical Centre
competitors.target_market: SG self-pay patients wanting one-stop screening (MRI + ultrasound + blood) at sub-hospital pricing
strengths: Mid-tier price band (~S$3,800) hits the affordable-self-pay sweet spot
Multi-modality under one roof — MRI, ultrasound, mammography, bloods
Established 20+ year SG reputation in the screening category
weaknesses: Pricing partially published — buyer needs to call for full breakdown
Website feels dated, mobile experience weak
No named-consultant-radiologist branding

competitors.name: Elite Medical Centre
competitors.target_market: SG HNW seeking concierge wellness-tier screening with longevity / hormone / advanced imaging bundles
strengths: Concierge wellness-tier positioning closest to AEVUM's intended brand
Longevity / hormone / advanced imaging bundles appeal to wellness-seekers
Modern website and on-brand visual language vs hospital sites
weaknesses: Pricing partial — 'enquire' gating creates friction
Brand spread thin across many service lines (hormone, IV, aesthetics) — not imaging-led
Premium SG real estate cost passes through to buyer

competitors.name: Iconic Medical Imaging
competitors.target_market: SG self-pay patients seeking standalone MRI with transparent online booking
strengths: Fully published online pricing — rare in SG imaging category
DTC-style booking flow, mobile-first UX
Fast turnaround (~48h) and friendly ops
weaknesses: Younger brand without HNW concierge cachet
No premium suite / robe / lounge experience
Limited follow-up specialist network

competitors.name: NUH (National University Hospital) — Public Health Screening
competitors.target_market: SG citizens / PRs eligible for subsidised screening, plus self-pay public hospital patients
strengths: World-class teaching-hospital clinical depth and follow-up specialist coverage
Subsidised pricing for eligible SG citizens / PRs
Trust signal — the public-hospital brand is unambiguous
weaknesses: Long appointment lead times and 2-week+ results turnaround
No concierge experience — public-hospital ambience by design
Booking flow is brochure-ware / paper-form era

competitors.name: SGH (Singapore General Hospital) — Health Screening
competitors.target_market: SG public-sector patients and self-pay seeking SingHealth-cluster hospital-anchored screening
strengths: 200-year SG public-hospital brand with the deepest specialist network
Subsidised tiers for eligible patients
Direct admission pathway if findings require intervention
weaknesses: Public-hospital queue and waitlist friction
No DTC concierge experience or premium suite
Pricing not fully published — quote-on-call gating

competitors.name: Mahkota Medical Centre
competitors.target_market: Indonesian medical-tourists and Malaysian affluent — primary cross-border player for SG-adjacent diagnostics
strengths: Established Indonesian-patient pipeline (~30% of intake) — proven cross-border concierge model
Hospital-grade follow-up specialists on site
Sub-S$2,000 MRI screening price in MYR
weaknesses: Melaka location — 2.5h drive from JB, not optimised for SG day-trippers
Brand reach in SG is limited; not on SG HNW radar
No concierge wellness-tier positioning — hospital-feel

competitors.name: KPJ Bandar Dato' Onn Specialist Hospital
competitors.target_market: JB residents and SG-adjacent middle-income patients seeking private hospital screening close to the Causeway
strengths: JB location — Causeway-adjacent, accessible to SG day-trippers
Largest Malaysian private hospital network (KPJ) — multi-site referral
Sub-S$1,500 whole-body MRI band — strong price advantage
weaknesses: Hospital-utility branding — no concierge / wellness positioning
MRI is one of many services — not imaging-led
Mid-quality named-consultant-radiologist roster

competitors.name: Gleneagles Hospital Johor
competitors.target_market: SG cross-border patients and JB affluent seeking IHH-network hospital screening
strengths: IHH Healthcare network — same parent as Mount Elizabeth and Parkway
Medini location — second-link Causeway accessible, near Legoland
Hospital-grade follow-up with international patient services desk
weaknesses: Premium positioning at sub-SG price still feels hospital, not concierge
MRI is one product line — no whole-body imaging-led branding
Bookings flow through hospital channels, not DTC

competitors.name: Sunway Medical Centre Velocity
competitors.target_market: KL HNW and SG cross-border patients flying into KL for one-day premium screening
strengths: Newer flagship facility with premium suite and concierge desk
Sunway Group brand carries property + retail trust spillover
MRI + cardiac CT + advanced bloods bundled at premium-mid price
weaknesses: KL location — 4h drive or 1h flight from SG, not day-trip
No specific JB / SG cross-border marketing
Hospital-anchored — concierge is amenity layer, not core

competitors.name: Pantai Hospital Penang
competitors.target_market: Indonesian medical-tourists, Penang affluent, and KL/SG cross-border patients
strengths: IHH network with Mt Elizabeth / Pantai brand spillover
Penang medical-tourism halo — Indonesian patient base
Sub-S$2,000 imaging band
weaknesses: Penang is far from SG — flight required, not Causeway
Hospital-feel, not concierge-feel
Limited SG cross-border marketing

competitors.name: Prenuvo
competitors.target_market: US/CA HNW longevity-seekers — global category-defining DTC whole-body MRI brand
strengths: Category-defining DTC whole-body MRI brand globally — Tony Robbins, Kim Kardashian endorsements
Beautiful concierge experience and DTC online booking flow
Fully published US$2,499 pricing — transparent benchmark
weaknesses: No SEA presence — closest centre is Sydney / LA
Anti-screening clinical-evidence debate (USPSTF skeptical) follows the brand
No follow-up specialist pathway — referral to home physician

competitors.name: Ezra
competitors.target_market: US tech-savvy 35–55 self-pay seeking AI-augmented whole-body MRI at lower DTC price
strengths: AI-augmented reading positioned as differentiator (FDA-cleared Bolt)
US$499 entry tier — global price floor for DTC MRI
Best-in-class digital UX — modern brand, mobile-first
weaknesses: No SEA presence
Entry tier is targeted scan, not whole-body — unbundling games
Clinical-evidence pushback applies

competitors.name: Neko Health
competitors.target_market: European HNW longevity-seekers — Spotify founder Daniel Ek's preventative health brand
strengths: Best-in-class concierge / spa-clinical hybrid experience — design language AEVUM aspires to
Same-day results turnaround — sets the global SLA bar
Daniel Ek brand halo + £400/€595 single-price simplicity
weaknesses: No SEA presence
Skin/cardio-led, not whole-body MRI specifically
Single-price model not adapted to multi-tier HNW

competitors.name: AEVUM (self)
competitors.target_market: Singapore HNW, Indonesian HNW, KL/JB affluent — premium concierge whole-body MRI 5 minutes from RTS Link, named consultant radiologists, MSQH accreditation in pursuit
strengths: Unique JB-proximity wedge — 5-minute RTS Link crossing end-2026, S$5–7 fare, no other premium MRI brand owns this geography
Fully published RM-tier pricing — Core RM1,999 / Comprehensive RM8,699 / Legacy Ultimate RM17,499 / Legacy Platinum RM24,499
Named consultant radiologists + same-day results — matches Neko SLA at sub-Mt Elizabeth price
Concierge clinical aesthetic with Elitez Group operational backing (350+ staff, 4 cities)
Cross-border SG↔JB arbitrage: ~78% saving vs Mount Elizabeth S$12,388 ceiling
weaknesses: New brand — zero SG awareness, must build trust v0
Cross-border friction: passport, RTS Link uptime, currency, regulatory clarity
No SG-licensed follow-up specialist pathway — handoff to SG GP/specialist required
MSQH accreditation in pursuit, not yet awarded

commonWeaknesses: SG hospital-anchored players (Raffles, Mt Elizabeth) sit at S$11K+ — explicit 'too expensive' signal in HNW screening forums.
SG standalone imaging (AsiaMedic, Lifescan, Elite) all gate price behind 'enquire' forms — creates friction for HNW used to DTC clarity.
JB private hospitals (KPJ, Gleneagles JB) own the geography but lead with hospital-utility, not concierge.
Public hospitals (NUH, SGH) deliver clinical depth but make the buyer wait 2+ weeks for results.
Global DTC leaders (Prenuvo, Ezra, Neko) have no SEA footprint — entire region is greenfield.
aevumAdvantages: Cross-border SG↔JB arbitrage with named geography (RTS Link 5-min, S$5–7) — no competitor owns this wedge.
Fully published RM tier pricing in a category that universally hides pricing.
Same-day results turnaround matches Neko Health SLA, beats every SG hospital comp.
Named consultant radiologists with concierge suite — combines hospital trust with DTC experience.
Elitez Group operational backing (37 yrs, 4 cities, 350 staff) — the parent of AEVUM is not a startup.

borrowed: Neko Health's spa-clinical hybrid aesthetic — calm warm tones, generous whitespace, single hero image.
Prenuvo's transparent published pricing on the homepage — no friction modal between intent and price.
Ezra's mobile-first DTC booking flow — 3-step intake before any phone call.
improved: Multi-tier RM published pricing (vs Neko's single-price simplicity) for genuine HNW concierge segmentation.
Named consultant radiologists displayed with credentials (vs Prenuvo's anonymous reading panel).
Cross-border concierge service stack — RTS Link transfer, day-trip planning, Singapore-billed invoicing — none exist elsewhere.

landscape.geography_advantage: AEVUM is the only premium concierge whole-body MRI brand within 5 minutes of the SG-MY border post the RTS Link end-2026 opening. The 78% saving vs Mt Elizabeth and 77% saving vs Raffles Platinum is structural, not promotional.
landscape.pricing_advantage: Fully published RM tier pricing is unique in the SG/MY MRI category. Every SG hospital, every standalone imaging centre, and every JB hospital gates price behind quote-on-call. AEVUM's transparent published pricing collapses the comparison friction the entire category depends on.
